response.justification: The candidate is a strong senior individual contributor with ~18 years of software development experience and genuine developer-tooling credentials (test runners, assertion libraries, CI/DevOps infrastructure, Selenium training, MCP code generators). However, this is fundamentally a people-management role, and the resume shows no formal people-management or team-leadership experience — every listed role is an IC position. The minimum requirement of 2 years of people management appears unmet, and there is no evidence of roadmap ownership, performance management, or leading organizational change. Mobile experience is limited to maintaining one iOS/Apple TV app a decade ago.
strengths: Deep, broad engineering experience (~18 years) across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Authentic developer-tools and testing-infrastructure background: open-source test runner (Trial), assertion library, CI/CD and GitLab infrastructure, TDD/craftsmanship advocacy
Demonstrated mentorship and knowledge-sharing through workshops, conference talks, and structured training courses
concerns: No formal people-management experience — fails the stated 2-year minimum for the core function of the role
No evidence of strategic roadmap planning, performance management, or leading organizational change at team/org scale
Mobile-platform knowledge is shallow and dated (one iOS/tvOS app in 2015-2016), while the role centers on a major mobile ecosystem

key_factors.factor: Developer tools and testing infrastructure depth
